about.title: About Us
about.lead: Where medical excellence meets the warmth every child deserves — in the heart of Botad.
about.paragraph1: At Shivam Children Hospital, we believe that every child deserves care that is not only medically sound but also filled with warmth, compassion, and hope. Since the day we opened our doors in Botad, our mission has been simple yet powerful — to stand beside families during their most important moments and provide healthcare they can trust with their hearts.
about.paragraph2: For parents, nothing matters more than the well-being of their child. We understand the fear, the worry, and the sleepless nights that come with illness. That is why our hospital was built not just as a medical facility, but as a place where families feel supported, heard, and cared for. Every child who enters our hospital is treated with the same love and attention we would give our own.
about.paragraph3: Our team of experienced pediatric specialists, nurses, and support staff work together to create an environment where healing feels natural and comforting. From newborn care and vaccinations to emergency support and general treatment, we ensure that every service reflects our commitment to safety, empathy, and excellence.
about.paragraph4: As an Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY) empanelled hospital, we proudly extend quality healthcare to families who need it most, ensuring that financial limitations never stand in the way of a child's treatment.
about.paragraph5: Over the years, Shivam Children Hospital has grown into a trusted name in Botad — not because of our infrastructure alone, but because of the relationships we've built with the community. Parents come to us with confidence, and children leave with smiles. That is the true measure of our success.
about.paragraph6: At our core, we are more than a hospital. We are a family dedicated to protecting the health, happiness, and future of every child who walks through our doors.
about.pmjayTitle: Ayushman Bharat — care for every family
about.locationNote: Shivam Children Hospital — Ummiya Complex (behind LIC Office), Paliyad Road, opposite Bus Stand, Botad, Gujarat 364710
about.ctaTitle: Ready to visit Shivam Children Hospital?
about.ctaDesc: Book a consultation or reach us for emergencies — we are here for families in Botad.

doctor.name: Dr. Jignesh D. Vaghela
doctor.bio: Dr. Vaghela leads Shivam Children Hospital with expertise in newborn intensive care, serious childhood illness, and long-term pediatric follow-up. Families across Botad rely on his guidance for both routine check-ups and critical care decisions.

services.title: Our Specialties
services.desc: Comprehensive pediatric services under one roof — from well-baby visits to intensive care.

facilities.title: Facilities & Equipment
facilities.desc: Modern infrastructure designed for safe, effective treatment and a comfortable family experience.

items.f1: Advanced NICU for newborns and low-birth-weight infants
items.f2: CPAP respiratory support for newborns with breathing difficulties
items.f4: Central oxygen lines, infusion pumps, pulse oximeters & glucometers
items.f5: Expert diagnosis and treatment for serious childhood illnesses
items.f6: Spacious waiting area and room options: Deluxe, Special, Semi-Special & General
items.f7: In-house pharmacy and pathology lab for convenient care
